Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-17 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows LINC commanding the top rank with an exceptional score of 95.2, demonstrating consistent outperformance across all timeframes—returning 1,315% over 10 years and outpacing SPY by 1,076% over the same period. The stock shows textbook momentum characteristics with all four moving average filters engaged (sma_all: true), a "clean" momentum signal of 1.94, and a "strong_buy" designation. In contrast, CLMT presents a more cautionary picture: while it ranks second with strong 1-year and 5-year returns (139.55% and 514.68% respectively), its 10-year return of just 150.56% signals significant recent momentum driving current performance, and its 10-year underperformance versus SPY (-88.02%) and QQQ (-329.42%) raises durability questions. Both stocks pass 4 of 5 ratio tests and trade above all major moving averages, but LINC's superior long-term consistency and lower "bad_spy_score" (0.21 vs 1.32) suggest it represents a more established trend than CLMT's potentially shorter-cycle acceleration.
